title: The Quiet Maw
description: The Quiet Maw is an unpredictable pyshological infection within your world with the goal of creating a disturbing and unsettling experience for the player.
body:
This horror mod is completely physcological. However, that doesn't make you safe..

This mod is in ALPHA meaning it is not fully complete.

**THIS MOD IS EXTREMELY SLOW PACED AND SUBTLE, YOU WILL NOT NOTICE ANYTHING MAJOR FOR THE FIRST 10 IN GAME DAYS**

# **What it does:**

This mod introduces an entity called the Quiet Maw into your world who will make you doubt yourself and your trust in the world, the mod gets worse over time and will slowly corrupt and erode over time..

This is an extremely slow paced mod, going from nothing, to barely noticable, to breaking or stealing, to figures stalking you, and worse over the span of many many days.



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/363f83138b90bf565eaa27819cfaec3d7e339449_0.webp)

</details>




# Commands:

**If you'd like to experiment with the mod you may, however I highly do not recommend it because it will ruin the experience later on.**




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

/qmhelp - See all commands

/addcorruption - Make the mod progress faster (+5 days in)

</details>
